description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a light-colored exterior and a dark, multi-faceted hip roof. The structure features large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. A driveway leads to a covered garage on one side, with a car parked in front. The house is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including palm trees, shrubs, and a patio area with outdoor seating. The main entryway is recessed beneath a small overhang, and there are balconies and patios that extend the living space outdoors. The overall design is modern with subtle traditional influences, blending comfort and functionality.
description: A two-story suburban house with a hip roof, large windows, a garage, and landscaped outdoor areas including patios and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, driveway with a car, main entryway, and a side patio with plants.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the main patio, outdoor seating, and lush landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_2: Side view displaying a large tree, side windows, and a glimpse of the backyard patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the garage, driveway, and additional greenery along the house perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a small overhang, adjacent to the garage, and surrounded by landscaped elements.
